name: Calcium Phosphate Transfection

components.name: 1. 转染前一天铺板至 50–70% 汇合度
- 2× HBS: 280 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, 1.5 mM Na₂HPO₄, pH 7.05
4. 逐滴将管 A 加入管 B，边滴边吹泡 (用巴氏管)
5. 室温静置 20 min (形成 DNA-Ca₃(PO₄)₂ 沉淀)
6. 逐滴加入培养皿，轻柔晃匀
9. 48–72 h 后收获 (蛋白表达 / 病毒上清)

notes.en: 2× HBS pH must be precisely 7.05 ± 0.02; deviations severely reduce efficiency. Optional glycerol shock: treat with 15% glycerol/PBS for 2 min at 8 h post-transfection, wash 2× PBS, replace medium. HEK293/293T efficiency can reach 80–90%. Preferred method for lentivirus packaging (low cost).
notes.zh: 2× HBS 的 pH 必须精确到 7.05 ± 0.02，偏差会严重影响效率！可选 glycerol shock: 转染后 8 h 用 15% 甘油/PBS 处理 2 min，PBS 洗 2 次，换新培养基。HEK293/293T 效率可达 80–90%。慢病毒包装首选此法 (成本低)。

ref: Kingston et al. (2003) Curr Protoc Mol Biol 9.1.1–9.1.11; Graham & van der Eb (1973) Virology 52:456–467

briefSteps.en: Plate cells to 50–70% confluency → mix DNA with 2.5 M CaCl₂ in ddH₂O → add dropwise to 2× HBS (pH 7.05) with bubbling → incubate 20 min at RT → add precipitate to cells → incubate 12–16 h → replace medium → harvest at 48–72 h
briefSteps.zh: 铺板至 50–70% 汇合度 → DNA 与 2.5 M CaCl₂ 混合加 ddH₂O → 鼓泡逐滴加入 2× HBS（pH 7.05）→ 室温静置 20 min → 逐滴加入细胞 → 孵育 12–16 h → 换液 → 48–72 h 后收获

detailedSteps.en: Day −1: Seed cells (e.g., HEK293T, 3–4×10⁶ per 10 cm dish) in complete DMEM without antibiotics to reach 50–70% confluency on Day 0.
detailedSteps.zh: Day −1：将细胞（如 HEK293T，3–4×10⁶/10 cm 皿）接种于不含抗生素的完全 DMEM，使 Day 0 汇合度达 50–70%。

detailedSteps.en: Day 0 — Tube A: Combine 20 µg plasmid DNA + 50 µL 2.5 M CaCl₂ + sterile ddH₂O to a final volume of 500 µL; mix gently.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 0 — 管 A：将 20 µg 质粒 DNA + 50 µL 2.5 M CaCl₂ + 无菌 ddH₂O 混合补至 500 µL；轻柔混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Tube B: Place 500 µL 2× HBS (pH 7.05 ± 0.02; 280 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, 1.5 mM Na₂HPO₄) in a separate tube. Verify pH is precisely 7.05 — this is critical.
detailedSteps.zh: 管 B：另取 500 µL 2× HBS（pH 7.05 ± 0.02；280 mM NaCl、50 mM HEPES、1.5 mM Na₂HPO₄）。pH 必须精确为 7.05，这一步至关重要。

detailedSteps.en: Add Tube A (DNA/CaCl₂) dropwise to Tube B (2× HBS) while continuously bubbling air through the HBS with a Pasteur pipette; this creates fine Ca₃(PO₄)₂ precipitates.
detailedSteps.zh: 用巴氏管持续向 2× HBS 中吹泡，同时将管 A（DNA/CaCl₂）逐滴加入管 B（2× HBS），形成细小的磷酸钙-DNA 共沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate the mixture at room temperature for 20 min without disturbing; a faint cloudiness indicates precipitate formation.
detailedSteps.zh: 混合物室温静置 20 min，不要振动；轻微浑浊表明沉淀已形成。

detailedSteps.en: Add the 1 mL precipitate dropwise to the 10 cm dish of cells while gently swirling; distribute evenly across the dish.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 1 mL 沉淀混合物逐滴加入 10 cm 培养皿中，同时轻柔晃动，使其均匀分布。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 12–16 h (overnight). A fine dark granular precipitate on cells is expected.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育 12–16 h（过夜）。细胞上出现细小黑色颗粒沉淀属正常现象。

detailedSteps.en: Optional glycerol shock (boosts efficiency): aspirate medium, add 2 mL 15% glycerol/PBS per 10 cm dish for exactly 2 min at RT, then wash twice with PBS and replace medium.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选甘油休克处理（提高效率）：吸去培养基，每皿加 2 mL 15% 甘油/PBS，室温处理恰好 2 min，PBS 洗两次，换新培养基。

detailedSteps.en: Replace medium with fresh complete DMEM; continue incubation at 37°C for 48–72 h before harvesting protein lysate or viral supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 换成新鲜完全 DMEM，37°C 继续孵育 48–72 h，然后收获蛋白裂解液或病毒上清。

note.en: Cells plate overnight at 37°C; proceed next morning
note.zh: 细胞 37°C 过夜铺板；次日早上继续

note.en: After medium change on Day 2, cells incubate 24–48 h for expression; harvest timing is flexible
note.zh: Day 2 换液后细胞孵育 24–48 h 待表达；收获时间灵活

usage.en: Transfect mammalian cells using calcium phosphate co-precipitation.
usage.zh: 磷酸钙共沉淀法转染哺乳动物细胞。
